articles.title: Amazon Rolls Out Long-Awaited Dark Mode for Kindle Colorsoft — Here's What It Means for Night Owls
articles.summary: Amazon is finally adding dark mode to its Kindle Colorsoft lineup. The update lets you customize which screens go dark, and colorful annotations stay visible. It's rolling out now, with a manual download available.

articles.title: NCAA Standout Teagan O'Dell Transfers to Virginia, Bolstering a Dynasty's Title Hopes
articles.summary: Freshman phenom Teagan O'Dell is leaving Cal for Virginia after a stellar NCAA debut. She scored 46 individual points and made three 'A' finals. Virginia, aiming for a 7th straight title, gains a crucial IM specialist.

articles.title: The Best Reel Mowers for a Quiet, Precise, and Eco-Friendly Cut
articles.summary: Reel mowers are making a comeback for small lawns. They cut grass like scissors, down to 0.5 inches, without gas or cords. We break down six top models, from a lightweight 14-inch to a self-propelled electric option.
